62eec0e50657a21915d9f5d4.leadin: In this novel, Isabel meets her disabled uncle, Ralph Touchett, after the death of her father. For 10 points each:
62eec0e50657a21915d9f5d4.leadin_sanitized: In this novel, Isabel meets her disabled uncle, Ralph Touchett, after the death of her father. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this novel in which Isabel Archer rejects the marriage proposals of Lord Warburton and Casper Goodwood, and discovers that her husband Gilbert had an affair with Madame Merle.
This early modernist author of Portrait of a Lady wrote a novella about a governess who believes she sees the ghost of Miss Jessel, The Turn of the Screw.
In this novel by Henry James, Catherine Sloper is forced to choose between her love for Morris Townsend and her devotion to her father, Dr. Austin Sloper.
